gt_sql: SELECT T3.first_name, T3.last_name FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.link_to_member = T3.member_id ORDER BY T2.spent DESC LIMIT 5
pred_sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(e.cost) DESC
LIMIT 5;
question: List the full name of the top five members who spend the most money in the descending order of spending.
